meaning: adj.用两眼的,给两眼用的 双目并用的
examples: Chromostereopsis involves cortical areas that underlie depth processing for both monocular and binocular cues.
All these figures actually apply strictly only to binocular observations.
The traffic accident scene investigation system based on binocular stereovision is designed.
In an interview, I asked Peli whether binocular rivalry could be an issue with Glass.
He was largely ignored, surrounded by binocular-holding tourists who had driven hours to look at birds.
